blended.narrative: Stoneham is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,335 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
